name: Resident Mentor Circle
bio: Mentors help students build strong sadhana, thoughtful habits, and a balanced inner life rooted in prayer, study, and compassion.
focus: Daily guidance, accountability, and devotional culture

name: Academic Support Team
bio: The academic team facilitates discussions, reading plans, reflection exercises, and practical application of the curriculum.

name: Community Life Coordinators
bio: Coordinators create a peaceful residential environment, organize service opportunities, and help students grow in cooperation.
focus: Hospitality, schedule flow, and shared responsibility

name: Temple Leadership Advisors
bio: Advisors ensure the academy remains connected to the larger temple mission, local outreach, and service opportunities in Birmingham.
focus: Temple connection, outreach, and long-term vision
